tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Search Agent Radar Tool Cards by query text and optional type, tag, or risk filters.

tools.name: get_tool_card
tools.description: Return one Tool Card and its Rating Result by stable tool_id.

tools.name: recommend_tools
tools.description: Recommend known tools for a task using request-scoped LLM credentials when required.

tools.name: explain_rating
tools.description: Return rating dimensions, explanations, penalties, and boosts for one tool_id.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "recommend_tools" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Recommend known tools for a task using request-scoped LLM credentials when required.
